question_text: What type of computer do you primarily use?
What is your favorite brand of CPU?
How much RAM do you have in your computer?
What type of storage do you use? (SSD, HDD, or both)
What is your preferred brand for motherboards?
Do you have a dedicated graphics card?
How often do you upgrade your computer parts?
What is the most important factor when choosing a computer case? (e.g., aesthetics, airflow, size)
On a scale of 1 to 5, how comfortable are you with building your own computer?
What is your budget for building a computer?
